maintainer_preferences: Do not move helpers to new packages - keep refactors within-package
Title feature: one --title TEXT flag only (not per-command separate flags)
go.mod and go.sum are protected files - cannot be pushed by automation
.github/workflows/release.yml is a protected file (see issue #388) - may need manual PR apply
notes: Run 27933214260 (2026-06-22): Tasks 5, 2, 3. Confirmed ginkgolinter rebase PR is #443. Labelled #444 (bug: same-level aggregation), #445 (enhancement: kebab-case naming). Fixed #444: validateAggregation in resolution.go now rejects same-level aggregation; metric_spec.go now validates agg expressions at LevelDirectory. Task 5: expression metrics now inherit base metric DefaultPalette in stages/metrics.go. Both PRs pending number resolution (expected #446 fix, #447 improve). PR #431 no longer in open PR list - likely merged. Commented on #444 (fix announced) and #445 (backwards-compat analysis). Next: verify PR #446 and #447 numbers; check if #431 was merged; continue Task 10 for issue #442 E2E tests.
